title: Boy band
content: A boy band is loosely defined as a vocal group consisting of young male singers, usually in their teenage years or in their twenties at the time of formation, singing love songs marketed towards girls. Many boy bands dance as well as sing, usually giving highly choreographed performances. Some such bands form on their own, often evolving out of church choral or gospel music groups. In contrast, many are created by talent manager s or record producers who hold auditions. Due to this and their general commercial orientation towards a female audience of preteen s, teenybopper s, or teens, the term can be pejorative in music journalism.
